titleStmt.title: SII 26.491: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 491. (A.R. No. 467 of 1909.) ĀḺVĀR-TIRUNAGARI, TIRUCHENDUR TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same shrine.

It records a gift of special privileges consisting of the god's grace (prasādam), food-articles, and flower at monthly festivals, special festivals, etc., made by Tribhuvaṉachakravartin Kōneriṉmaikoṇḍān to Vakulābharaṇabhaṭṭan of Maṇalūr who usually recited the Dharma, Itihāsa and Purāṇa and holy Ślōkas and on special occassions also, in the temple of Poliñjuniṉṟaruḷiya Paramasvāmigaḷ, and Āḻvār Tirunnāḍuḍaiyapirāṉ in Tiruvaḻudi-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulacekaradevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉeḻāvatu
tribhuvaṉacakravatti koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ maṇalūr vakuḷāparaṇapaṭṭaṟku tiruva
ḻutivaḷanāṭṭu tirukkoyil poliñcuniṉṟaruḷiyaparamasvāmikaḷukkum Āḻvār tirunāṭuṭai
yapirāṉukkum tarma ḷatihāsa purāṇaṅkaḷum vācittu ciṟappukkaḷukkum vācittu cu
ślokaṅkaḷuñ colli Itukku muṉpupeṟṟup potumpaṭiyile nāḷoṉṟu
kku muṉṟu prasādamum Iraṇṭu Appamum Oru Akkāraiyum nālu tiruttampalamum
Oru piṭikaḷaka prasādamum toraṇamālaiyum māta Utsavaṅkaḷilum tirunāḷ ka(ḷ)ḷilum tiruva
ttiyyaṉaṅkaḷilum ciṟappākap peṟṟu potum peṟupeṟukaḷun tāmun tammuṭaiyavaṟ
kattārum vācittup peṟṟuppotavum Ippaṭi cantirātittavat celvatāka kallilum cem
pilum veṭṭikkoḷḷavum pāṟka Ivai Āṉāntūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu patiṉeḻā
vatu nāḷ 3 100 4 10 6 Ivai yātavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu 1 Ivai paḻantivarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
svastyastu
Digital edition of SII 26.491 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
